name: African Fruit Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the fruits by cutting them into very small pieces.
2. Halve and seed the papaya, then peel and slice the flesh into small pieces.
3. Peel the mangoes and remove as much of the flesh from the pit as possible, being careful to capture juices. Slice into small pieces and add to the bowl with the papaya.
4. Cut the pineapple in half lengthwise, remove the skin (including any eyes or dark spots), and cut into small pieces. Capture juices as you cut and add to the fruit mixture.
5. Peel and slice the bananas into small pieces.
6. Mix all fruits well, cover, and refrigerate until chilled.
7. Add the banana pieces just before serving to prevent browning.
Serves 8
This recipe was tested for accuracy by Reggie & Jeff Dwork (reggie@reggie.com).
